stages.label: Sidecar release gate tests
stages.command: bun test tests/runtime-commands.test.ts tests/capability-commands.test.ts tests/workspace-commands.test.ts tests/task-event-bus.test.ts tests/task-session-store.test.ts tests/execution-runtime.test.ts tests/work-request-runtime.test.ts tests/planning-files.test.ts tests/release-readiness.test.ts

warnings: No appDataDir provided; startup metrics inspection skipped.

checklist.item: Restrict initial rollout to named internal testers or a small external beta cohort.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Tester list, install channel, and rollback contact owner documented.

checklist.item: Keep the previous signed/notarized bundle and matching tag available for immediate rollback.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Previous release asset URLs or archived artifacts attached to the release issue.

checklist.item: Collect startup metrics and artifact telemetry from at least one canary session before widening the rollout.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Startup metrics JSONL path and artifact telemetry JSONL excerpt linked in release notes or issue.

checklist.item: Run the database failure recovery scenario and verify logs show the expected recovery path.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Playwright report or captured logs from the failure-injection run.

checklist.item: Check sidecar and managed service health after install and after the first task execution.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Health check output or screenshots from the dependency/service status UI.

checklist.item: Hold rollout expansion until no blocker regression remains in readiness report warnings or failed stages.
checklist.requiredEvidence: Final go/no-go comment referencing the readiness report artifact.
